title: mentha heterophylla
intro: Mentha heterophylla, also known as Corn Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Corn Mint include alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving respiratory health. Corn Mint can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
